This space was built for you.

How we work together

Ways to find your sanctuary

Whether you're navigating a career pivot, working through workplace trauma, or simply ready to grow, there's a path designed for exactly where you are.

01

1:1 Coaching

Real, one-on-one support to help you get clear on your goals, move past what's been holding you back, and thrive at work and in life.

Learn more →
02

Group Coaching

A supportive circle of sisters growing together through guided conversations, shared reflection, and collective strategy.

Learn more →
03

Workshops and Events

Engaging, affirming spaces including the "Navigating Microaggressions" workshop, designed to nourish, empower, and connect.

See upcoming →

Meet your guide

Hi, I'm Brionna

I'm the founder of The Sis Sanctuary, a space born from my own experience navigating the invisible weight of corporate spaces as a Black woman.

After three layoffs and too many toxic workplaces to count, I went looking for community that truly got it. When I couldn't find it, I built it.

Certified Master of Career Services Global Career Development Facilitator Certified Professional Coach MSW Candidate
Read My Full Story

Ready to begin?

Your sanctuary
is waiting.

Let's find the right path for where you are and where you're going.
